title: Source Ingestion, Parsing, OCR, Provenance, and Trust · Runtime Lens: Rag Canonical Document Identity
summary: A connector strips headings and page coordinates from mixed PDFs, silently skips parse failures, duplicates documents, and treats retrieved instructions as trusted application policy. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the canonical document identity increment in provenance-preserving ingestion ledger. Learners…
objectives: Detect exact and near duplicates while preserving editions, amendments, canonical identity, supersession, and provenance.
Retain page, region, reading order, table, figure, coordinate, OCR confidence, and source-image links when extraction needs layout evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: rag-canonical-document-identity — Detect exact and near duplicates while preserving editions, amendments, canonical identity, supersession, and provenance.
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-ingestion-provenance-2
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-ingestion-provenance-2.
# Case 7417: a regulated document deletion request.
# Operating constraint: record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall.
def worked_rag_ingestion_provenance_2(source_id: str = "manual-v3", bytes_read: int = 4096, parse_errors: int = 0, licensed: bool = True, provenance_kept: bool = True, content_trusted: bool = False) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "corpusworked2",
        "query2dekrow",
        "tenant7417",
        "indexworked27417",
        "prompt2dekrow7417",
        "evaluation7417worked2",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if not source_id or bytes_read < 0:
        return False, bytes_read, "source-admission"
    if parse_errors > 0:
        return False, parse_errors, "parse-quarantine"
    if not licensed or not provenance_kept:
        return False, bytes_read, "provenance-policy"
    if content_trusted:
        return False, bytes_read, "data-is-not-instruction"
    assert source_id == "manual-v3"
    return True, bytes_read, "quarantined-source"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-canonical-document-identity-1xamtl
# Competency: rag-canonical-document-identity.
# Case 3446: a multimodal maintenance-manual release.
# Operating constraint: record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope.
def evidence_rag_canonical_document_identity_1xamtl(source_id: str = "manual-v3", bytes_read: int = 4096, parse_errors: int = 0, licensed: bool = True, provenance_kept: bool = True, content_trusted: bool = False) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1xamtl = "1xamtl-ltmax1-3446"
    assert evidence_variant_1xamtl
    evidence_axes_1xamtl = (
        "corpus1xamtl",
        "queryltmax1",
        "tenant3446",
        "index1xamtl3446",
        "promptltmax13446",
        "evaluation34461xamtl",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1xamtl)) == 6
    if not source_id or bytes_read < 0:
        return False, bytes_read, "source-admission"
    if parse_errors > 0:
        return False, parse_errors, "parse-quarantine"
    if not licensed or not provenance_kept:
        return False, bytes_read, "provenance-policy"
    if content_trusted:
        return False, bytes_read, "data-is-not-instruction"
    assert source_id == "manual-v3"
    return True, bytes_read, "quarantined-source"
